overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk video game showing a character with a glowing yellow umbrella walking through a rain-soaked neon-lit city at night. The character traverses wet sidewalks, crosses intersections, and visits an outdoor bar with vibrant purple lighting before returning to the plaza.

events.description: passing a digital advertising kiosk on the left while maintaining walking pace

agents.ego_description: character with glowing yellow circular umbrella walking steadily along the wet sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green pants and pink top walking toward the camera

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the street
bright cyan and yellow neon signs illuminating building facades

black and yellow striped bollards separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy cyberpunk city street at night, following a character with a distinctive glowing yellow umbrella. Palm trees line the left side while neon storefronts glow on the right. The wet concrete sidewalk reflects the vibrant lights as the character walks past digital advertising kiosks and traffic bollards.

scene_state.functional_zone: city intersection with tall cylindrical skyscraper

events.description: crossing the wet asphalt street at a crosswalk while traffic waits at the light
camera pans upward to reveal the full height of the cylindrical skyscraper covered in digital billboards

agents.ego_description: character crossing the street and then looking up at the towering building while continuing to walk

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving past on the wet street

entered.detail: tall building wrapped in multiple layers of digital billboards and neon lights
overhead traffic signals showing red and green lights

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a wet asphalt intersection, passing traffic lights and a red sports car. The camera then pans up to reveal a massive cylindrical skyscraper covered in bright digital billboards against the night sky. The surrounding buildings feature heavy neon signage reflecting off the rain-soaked streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor cyberpunk bar with purple neon lighting

events.description: entering the covered outdoor bar area with distinct purple and pink neon lighting
circling around the curved bar counter to show patrons sitting on glowing stools

agents.ego_description: character walking around the outdoor bar, observing the neon-lit interior and seated patrons

notable_agents.action: bartender serving drinks behind the curved purple-lit counter
patron with red hair sitting on a glowing purple stool drinking

entered.detail: curved bar counter with glowing purple neon edges and illuminated stools
overhead shelter with red and purple neon lighting protecting from rain
screens displaying drink menus and advertisements above the bar

segments.scene_description: The character enters a semi-covered outdoor bar bathed in vibrant purple and pink neon light. The curved bar counter features glowing stools where patrons sit drinking. The camera circles around the bar, showing the bartender serving drinks and digital menu screens above the counter, while the rain continues to fall outside the sheltered area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with construction barriers and parked vehicles

events.description: exiting the bar area back into the open plaza with scattered pedestrians
passing by red and white construction barriers near the street edge

agents.ego_description: character walking through the open plaza away from the bar, approaching the street with construction barriers

notable_agents.action: person with red hair and tactical gear walking toward the camera

entered.detail: red and white striped concrete barriers blocking off a street section
futuristic cars parked along the edge of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character exits the bar back into the open plaza, where the rain continues to fall. Red and white construction barriers line the left side near parked futuristic vehicles. The character passes by a pedestrian with red hair and tactical gear while walking toward the street, with neon signs from nearby buildings illuminating the wet pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked cyberpunk street that gradually expands from a narrow sidewalk into a towering urban vista. It begins by trailing a character with a glowing yellow umbrella along a wet concrete path, flanked by palm trees and neon storefronts that shimmer in the reflections. As the character moves forward past digital kiosks and traffic bollards, the scene shifts toward a wide asphalt intersection where a red sports car sits beneath the glow of traffic lights. The camera then pans upward from the street level to reveal a massive cylindrical skyscraper draped in bright digital billboards, while the surrounding neon signage blends into the dark night sky.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the sheltered, neon-drenched interior of a futuristic bar back into the rain-soaked openness of a city plaza. It begins by circling a curved bar counter bathed in vibrant purple and pink light, where patrons sit on glowing stools beneath digital menu screens while rain falls just beyond the shelter. As the character moves away from the bartender, the scene shifts from the concentrated glow of the bar to the expansive, wet pavement of the outdoor plaza. The camera then tracks the character past red and white construction barriers and parked futuristic vehicles, passing a red-haired pedestrian in tactical gear. Finally, the view opens toward the street, where the surrounding neon signs reflect off the shimmering ground under the persistent rainfall.
